title: #AIS: Bestie AMA with Valor's Antonio Gracias
description:
This talk was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 Antonio Gracias joins to talk: Tesla's early days, investing in Elon, macroeconomic outlook, ROIC, importance of energy independence, future of manufacturing, financial-ization of the P&L & more

22:35 Q: How has the poker game influenced your decision making in business and life?

29:33 Q: What was the scariest step of becoming a first-time fund manager?

32:34 Q: Crypto market unwinding & how it relates to the money supply

35:57 Q: Current pre-seed / seed valuations & metrics

38:58 Q: When investing in early-stage SaaS companies, how to find outliers?

42:11 Q: What would you do if dropped in the middle of Kansas at age 25 with no resources?

44:46 Q: Where will the next disruptions in industrial automation come from & how will the US hit economies of scale in semiconductor manufacturing

47:02 Q: Any plans for All-In Media?

50:02 Q: US strategy in the Russia/Ukraine War

54:19 Q: How have your first impressions changed as you've matured in your career, and whose first impressions have stood out to you the most?

58:29 Q: Are you interested in crypto micropayments?

1:00:55 Q: Biggest mistakes of your career that you've learned the most from?

1:09:54 Q: What impact could tech have on political discourse? What does a viable path forward look like?

1:15:36 Q: Are remote / distributed startup systems viable coming out of the pandemic?

1:19:41 Q: Advice for non-technical people trying to get into the startup world?

1:24:44 Q: Thoughts on the potential consumer credit crisis?

1:26:17 Lightning round: What problem do you most want to solve right now? All-In consortium? Can SMBs democratize their own labor supply? How to get more investors interested in hardware? Will this be a relatively short recession?

analysis.summary: Antonio Gracias joins the All-In Summit to discuss his experiences with Tesla, investing in Elon Musk, and his outlook on the macroeconomic landscape. He also shares insights on energy independence, the future of manufacturing, and the financialization of the P&L. Additionally, Gracias answers various questions from the audience, covering topics such as crypto market unwinding, seed valuations, and industrial automation.

takeaways.text: Energy independence is crucial for a country's economic stability
Poker game influences decision making in business and life
Finding outliers in early-stage SaaS companies is key to successful investing
Industrial automation will drive the next disruptions in manufacturing
First impressions can be misleading, and maturity brings new perspectives
Tech can have a significant impact on political discourse
Remote and distributed startup systems can be viable post-pandemic
Non-technical people can break into the startup world with the right advice and mindset

sentiment.notes: The conversation is upbeat, with a focus on opportunities for growth and innovation. Antonio Gracias shares his positive outlook on the future of manufacturing and energy independence.

notable_moments.description: Antonio Gracias discusses how poker has influenced his decision making
Gracias shares his thoughts on the next disruptions in industrial automation
The conversation turns to the impact of tech on political discourse
